questions.question: In what country is Normandy located?

responses.answer: Normandy is located in France. The name 'Normandy' comes from the Normans, who were Norse raiders that settled in the region during the 10th and 11th centuries [1].
Normandy is located in France [1].
Normandy is a region in France [1][2].
The evidence needed to answer this question has not been provided. However, based on general knowledge, Normandy is located in France.

The Normans (Norman: Nourmands; French: Normands; Latin: Normanni) were the people who, in the 10th and 11th centuries, gave their name to Normandy, a region in France. They were descended from Norse raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland, and Norway. Their leader, Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia. The distinct cultural and ethnic identity of the Normans emerged initially in the first half of the 10th century and continued to evolve over the succeeding centuries [1][2].

responses.answer: The Normans were a group of people originally descended from Norse (Viking) settlers who settled in what is now Normandy, France, in the 9th and 10th centuries. They were known for their military prowess and played a significant role in European history, particularly during the medieval period. The most notable event associated with the Normans is the Norman Conquest of England in 1066, led by William the Conqueror, which resulted in significant cultural and political changes in England. The Normans also established a feudal system and were instrumental in the development of medieval architecture, including the construction of castles and cathedrals. Their influence extended beyond France and England, impacting regions such as Italy and the Mediterranean.

Super Bowl 50 was an American football game to determine the champion of the National Football League (NFL) for the 2015 season. The American Football Conference (AFC) champion Denver Broncos defeated the National Football Conference (NFC) champion Carolina Panthers 24–10 to earn their third Super Bowl title. The game was played on February 7, 2016, at Levi's Stadium in the San Francisco Bay Area at Santa Clara, California.

As this was the 50th Super Bowl, the league emphasized the "golden anniversary" with various gold-themed initiatives, as well as temporarily suspending the tradition of naming each Super Bowl game with Roman numerals (under which the game would have been known as "Super Bowl L"), so that the logo could prominently feature the Arabic numerals 50.

The Normans (Norman: Nourmands; French: Normands; Latin: Normanni) were the people who in the 10th and 11th centuries gave their name to Normandy, a region in France. They were descended from Norse ("Norman" comes from "Norseman") raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland and Norway who, under their leader Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia. Through generations of assimilation and mixing with the native Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations, their descendants would gradually merge with the Carolingian-based cultures of West Francia.

1. Introducing the topic 
 
Today I will give you a presentation about smart home. First of all, I chose this topic 
because it’s an interesting form of new technology and I also want to work with IoT 
in the future, however I will come back this point later. 
I have divided my presentation into 7 parts: 
First, I would like to start with the concept. 
Second, I will focus on the technical solutions. 
After that, we will deal with the network and components. 
Then, I will move on to systems and technologies. 
Finally, the last section will be about diagrams. 
During the presentation don’t interrupt me, please! It can take my attention off the 
speech. If you don’t mind, we will leave the questions till then end. 
 
2. What is a smart home? 
 
Now, let’s begin with some questions. Could there be something smarter than your 
phone? What is a smart home accurately?  
Yes, many things can be smarter than your phone. For example, your washing 
machine, your bed, but even your house. 
A smart home is a household with controllabe electronic devices, which make 
everyday tasks easier. 
 
3. Technical solutions 
 
This leads me to my second point: Technical solutions. 
Although this concept appears to be involved only IT intervention, the 
implementation requires the cooperation of many specialized fields. 
Including electronics, architecture, automation, telecommunications etc.  
In order to build a smart home, much more special intervention is required than for 
an average house.

retrieved_contexts.title: doc-3e60d1c7b9c5-c1
retrieved_contexts.text:
I mentioned earlier some smart devices. A really specialized field of computer science 
deals with these. In fact there is a professional term for this field:  
IoT, in otherwords Internet of Things. Officaly, it includes physical objects with 
sensors, processing ability, software and other technologies that connect and 
exchange data with other devices and systems over the Internet.

retrieved_contexts.text: The Normans (Norman: Nourmands; French: Normands; Latin: Normanni) were the people who in the 10th and 11th centuries gave their name to Normandy, a region in France. They were descended from Norse ("Norman" comes from "Norseman") raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland and Norway who, under their leader Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia. Through generations of assimilation and mixing with the native Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations, their descendants would gradually merge with the Carolingian-based cultures of West Francia.

Super Bowl 50 was an American football game to determine the champion of the National Football League (NFL) for the 2015 season. The American Football Conference (AFC) champion Denver Broncos defeated the National Football Conference (NFC) champion Carolina Panthers 24–10 to earn their third Super Bowl title. The game was played on February 7, 2016, at Levi's Stadium in the San Francisco Bay Area at Santa Clara, California.

As this was the 50th Super Bowl, the league emphasized the "golden anniversary" with various gold-themed initiatives, as well as temporarily suspending the tradition of naming each Super Bowl game with Roman numerals (under which the game would have been known as "Super Bowl L"), so that the logo could prominently feature the Arabic numerals 50.

The Normans (Norman: Nourmands; French: Normands; Latin: Normanni) were the people who in the 10th and 11th centuries gave their name to Normandy, a region in France. They were descended from Norse ("Norman" comes from "Norseman") raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland and Norway who, under their leader Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia. Through generations of assimilation and mixing with the native Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations, their descendants would gradually merge with the Carolingian-based cultures of West Francia.

1. Introducing the topic 
 
Today I will give you a presentation about smart home. First of all, I chose this topic 
because it’s an interesting form of new technology and I also want to work with IoT 
in the future, however I will come back this point later. 
I have divided my presentation into 7 parts: 
First, I would like to start with the concept. 
Second, I will focus on the technical solutions. 
After that, we will deal with the network and components. 
Then, I will move on to systems and technologies. 
Finally, the last section will be about diagrams. 
During the presentation don’t interrupt me, please! It can take my attention off the 
speech. If you don’t mind, we will leave the questions till then end. 
 
2. What is a smart home? 
 
Now, let’s begin with some questions. Could there be something smarter than your 
phone? What is a smart home accurately?  
Yes, many things can be smarter than your phone. For example, your washing 
machine, your bed, but even your house. 
A smart home is a household with controllabe electronic devices, which make 
everyday tasks easier. 
 
3. Technical solutions 
 
This leads me to my second point: Technical solutions. 
Although this concept appears to be involved only IT intervention, the 
implementation requires the cooperation of many specialized fields. 
Including electronics, architecture, automation, telecommunications etc.  
In order to build a smart home, much more special intervention is required than for 
an average house.

retrieved_contexts.title: doc-3e60d1c7b9c5-c1
retrieved_contexts.text:
I mentioned earlier some smart devices. A really specialized field of computer science 
deals with these. In fact there is a professional term for this field:  
IoT, in otherwords Internet of Things. Officaly, it includes physical objects with 
sensors, processing ability, software and other technologies that connect and 
exchange data with other devices and systems over the Internet.

They were descended from Norse ("Norman" comes from "Norseman") raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland and Norway who, under their leader Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia. Through generations of assimilation and mixing with the native Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations, their descendants would gradually merge with the Carolingian-based cultures of West Francia.

responses.answer: The Normans (Norman: Nourmands; French: Normands; Latin: Normanni) were the people who, in the 10th and 11th centuries, gave their name to Normandy, a region in France. They were descended from Norse raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland, and Norway. The term 'Norman' comes from 'Norseman.' Under their leader Rollo, these Norsemen swore fealty to King Charles III of West Francia, which led to their settlement in the area. Through generations of assimilation and mixing with the native Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations, their descendants gradually merged with the Carolingian-based cultures of West Francia [1].

responses.answer:
The Normans were a group of people originally descended from Norse (Viking) settlers who settled in what is now northern France, particularly in the region known as Normandy. The name "Norman" itself derives from "Northman," reflecting their Viking heritage. In the 10th century, these Norsemen began to assimilate into the local Frankish culture, adopting the French language and Christianity.

The Normans are particularly known for their significant role in European history during the 11th century, especially following the Norman Conquest of England in 1066. Led by William the Conqueror, the Normans invaded England, which resulted in profound changes in the English language, culture, and governance. The Normans also established a feudal system and built numerous castles and cathedrals, many of which still stand today.

In addition to their influence in England, the Normans expanded their reach into other parts of Europe, including Italy and the Mediterranean, where they established kingdoms and principalities. Their legacy includes advancements in architecture, military organization, and governance, which had lasting impacts on the regions they controlled.

1. Introducing the topic 
 
Today I will give you a presentation about smart home. First of all, I chose this topic 
because it’s an interesting form of new technology and I also want to work with IoT 
in the future, however I will come back this point later. 
I have divided my presentation into 7 parts: 
First, I would like to start with the concept. 
Second, I will focus on the technical solutions. 
After that, we will deal with the network and components. 
Then, I will move on to systems and technologies. 
Finally, the last section will be about diagrams. 
During the presentation don’t interrupt me, please! It can take my attention off the 
speech. If you don’t mind, we will leave the questions till then end. 
 
2. What is a smart home? 
 
Now, let’s begin with some questions. Could there be something smarter than your 
phone? What is a smart home accurately?  
Yes, many things can be smarter than your phone. For example, your washing 
machine, your bed, but even your house. 
A smart home is a household with controllabe electronic devices, which make 
everyday tasks easier. 
 
3. Technical solutions 
 
This leads me to my second point: Technical solutions. 
Although this concept appears to be involved only IT intervention, the 
implementation requires the cooperation of many specialized fields. 
Including electronics, architecture, automation, telecommunications etc.  
In order to build a smart home, much more special intervention is required than for 
an average house.

retrieved_contexts.title: doc-3e60d1c7b9c5-c1
retrieved_contexts.text:
I mentioned earlier some smart devices. A really specialized field of computer science 
deals with these. In fact there is a professional term for this field:  
IoT, in otherwords Internet of Things. Officaly, it includes physical objects with 
sensors, processing ability, software and other technologies that connect and 
exchange data with other devices and systems over the Internet.

responses.answer: The Normans were people who lived in the 10th and 11th centuries in Normandy, France. They descended from Norse raiders and pirates from Denmark, Iceland, and Norway. Their leader, Rollo, agreed to swear fealty to King Charles III of West Francia, which led to their merging with the Frankish and Roman-Gaulish populations over generations [1]. However, the evidence does not provide specific names or identities for individuals referred to as 'Normans #1,' 'Normans #2,' or 'Normans #3.'

responses.answer:
The Normans were a group of people originally descended from Norse Vikings who settled in what is now northern France, specifically in the region known as Normandy. They became known as the Normans, derived from "Northmen" or "Norsemen." In the 10th century, they adopted the local Gallo-Roman culture and language, which led to significant cultural and political developments.

The Normans are particularly famous for their role in the Norman Conquest of England in 1066, when William the Conqueror, the Duke of Normandy, invaded England and defeated King Harold II at the Battle of Hastings. This event had profound effects on English society, language, and governance, as the Normans introduced feudalism and significantly influenced the English language with many Norman French words.

In addition to England, the Normans established territories in various parts of Europe, including parts of Italy and the Mediterranean, where they played a crucial role in the Crusades and the establishment of the Kingdom of Sicily. Their legacy includes impressive architectural achievements, such as castles and cathedrals, and they are often credited with shaping medieval European history.

1. Introducing the topic 
 
Today I will give you a presentation about smart home. First of all, I chose this topic 
because it’s an interesting form of new technology and I also want to work with IoT 
in the future, however I will come back this point later. 
I have divided my presentation into 7 parts: 
First, I would like to start with the concept. 
Second, I will focus on the technical solutions. 
After that, we will deal with the network and components. 
Then, I will move on to systems and technologies. 
Finally, the last section will be about diagrams. 
During the presentation don’t interrupt me, please! It can take my attention off the 
speech. If you don’t mind, we will leave the questions till then end. 
 
2. What is a smart home? 
 
Now, let’s begin with some questions. Could there be something smarter than your 
phone? What is a smart home accurately?  
Yes, many things can be smarter than your phone. For example, your washing 
machine, your bed, but even your house. 
A smart home is a household with controllabe electronic devices, which make 
everyday tasks easier. 
 
3. Technical solutions 
 
This leads me to my second point: Technical solutions. 
Although this concept appears to be involved only IT intervention, the 
implementation requires the cooperation of many specialized fields. 
Including electronics, architecture, automation, telecommunications etc.  
In order to build a smart home, much more special intervention is required than for 
an average house.

retrieved_contexts.text:
I mentioned earlier some smart devices. A really specialized field of computer science 
deals with these. In fact there is a professional term for this field:  
IoT, in otherwords Internet of Things. Officaly, it includes physical objects with 
sensors, processing ability, software and other technologies that connect and 
exchange data with other devices and systems over the Internet.

responses.answer: The Normans lived primarily during the 10th to 12th centuries. They originated from the Viking settlers in the region of Normandy, France, who began to establish their presence in the late 9th century. The most notable events associated with the Normans, such as the Norman Conquest of England, occurred in the 11th century, specifically in 1066. Their influence continued into the 12th century as they expanded their territories and established feudal systems in various regions.

1. Introducing the topic 
 
Today I will give you a presentation about smart home. First of all, I chose this topic 
because it’s an interesting form of new technology and I also want to work with IoT 
in the future, however I will come back this point later. 
I have divided my presentation into 7 parts: 
First, I would like to start with the concept. 
Second, I will focus on the technical solutions. 
After that, we will deal with the network and components. 
Then, I will move on to systems and technologies. 
Finally, the last section will be about diagrams. 
During the presentation don’t interrupt me, please! It can take my attention off the 
speech. If you don’t mind, we will leave the questions till then end. 
 
2. What is a smart home? 
 
Now, let’s begin with some questions. Could there be something smarter than your 
phone? What is a smart home accurately?  
Yes, many things can be smarter than your phone. For example, your washing 
machine, your bed, but even your house. 
A smart home is a household with controllabe electronic devices, which make 
everyday tasks easier. 
 
3. Technical solutions 
 
This leads me to my second point: Technical solutions. 
Although this concept appears to be involved only IT intervention, the 
implementation requires the cooperation of many specialized fields. 
Including electronics, architecture, automation, telecommunications etc.  
In order to build a smart home, much more special intervention is required than for 
an average house.

I mentioned earlier some smart devices. A really specialized field of computer science 
deals with these. In fact there is a professional term for this field:  
IoT, in otherwords Internet of Things. Officaly, it includes physical objects with 
sensors, processing ability, software and other technologies that connect and 
exchange data with other devices and systems over the Internet.
